testcase.name: test_admin_login_works

failure.message: AssertionError: assert None == 'admin@notarychain.com' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe56ae63ebc0>('email') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe56ae63ebc0> = {}.get + where {} = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe56ae63e940>('user', {}) + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe56ae63e940> = {'access_token': 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJhZG1pbkBub3RhcnljaGFpbi5jb20iLCJleHAiOjE3NzI1OTEyMzJ9.s9DCTAO6LePuOqnT5ikjAL9bVIxmmOmhqrOtA-vIqYM', 'requires_2fa': False, 'temp_token': None, 'token_type': 'bearer'}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_p2_notifications.py:48: in test_admin_login_works assert data.get("user", {}).get("email") == ADMIN_EMAIL E AssertionError: assert None == 'admin@notarychain.com' E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe56ae63ebc0>('email') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe56ae63ebc0> = {}.get E + where {} = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe56ae63e940>('user', {}) E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe56ae63e940> = {'access_token': 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJhZG1pbkBub3RhcnljaGFpbi5jb20iLCJleHAiOjE3NzI1OTEyMzJ9.s9DCTAO6LePuOqnT5ikjAL9bVIxmmOmhqrOtA-vIqYM', 'requires_2fa': False, 'temp_token': None, 'token_type': 'bearer'}.get

testcase.name: test_demo_login_works

failure.message: AssertionError: assert None == 'demo@test.com' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe56ae4b7200>('email') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe56ae4b7200> = {}.get + where {} = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe56ae4b75c0>('user', {}) + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe56ae4b75c0> = {'access_token': 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJkZW1vQHRlc3QuY29tIiwiZXhwIjoxNzcyNTkxMjMzfQ.3anHgHQSSMmj3zQ_PpeCb6UraZ6RVVZL60jdbmdi8TA', 'requires_2fa': False, 'temp_token': None, 'token_type': 'bearer'}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_p2_notifications.py:60: in test_demo_login_works assert data.get("user", {}).get("email") == DEMO_EMAIL E AssertionError: assert None == 'demo@test.com' E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe56ae4b7200>('email') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe56ae4b7200> = {}.get E + where {} = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe56ae4b75c0>('user', {}) E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe56ae4b75c0> = {'access_token': 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJkZW1vQHRlc3QuY29tIiwiZXhwIjoxNzcyNTkxMjMzfQ.3anHgHQSSMmj3zQ_PpeCb6UraZ6RVVZL60jdbmdi8TA', 'requires_2fa': False, 'temp_token': None, 'token_type': 'bearer'}.get
